text: A jogger running along a park path in the early morning. The person is mid-stride with arms swinging naturally. Trees and a bench are visible in the background.
A woman sitting at an outdoor cafe table, holding a coffee cup in her right hand. She is leaning slightly forward with her legs crossed under the table.
Two people standing at a bus stop. The person on the left is looking at their phone with both hands. The person on the right is standing with hands in pockets.
A child lying on the grass in a park, looking up at the sky. Arms are spread out to the sides and legs are slightly bent at the knees.
A basketball player in mid-jump shot, arms extended above the head. The player's body is fully extended with feet off the ground.
A person partially visible behind a store counter, with only the upper body visible. They are reaching up to a shelf with their right arm while their left arm rests on the counter.
A yoga practitioner holding a warrior pose on a mat outdoors. The front leg is bent at 90 degrees, back leg is straight, and both arms are extended horizontally.
An office worker seated at a desk, typing on a keyboard. The person is slightly hunched forward with elbows bent at approximately 90 degrees.
A cyclist riding a bicycle on a city street. The person is leaning forward with hands gripping the handlebars, pedaling with legs in alternating extension.
A person standing on a train platform, carrying a backpack and holding a suitcase. They are standing upright with weight shifted slightly to the left leg.
